g.text: Rust API Design for Diag Lib
+from_future<Fut>(future: Fut) : Self where Fut: Future<Output = Result<(), DataError>> + Send
+from_closure<Func>(func: Func) : Self where Func: FnOnce() -> Result<(), DataError> + Send
+with_status_reporter<Func>(func: Func) : ExecutionEvent where Func: FnOnce(ExecutionStatus, ExecutionStatusDetails)
+from_closure<Func>(func: Func) : Self where Func: FnOnce() -> ExecutionResult
+from_future<Fut>(future: Fut) : Self where Fut: Future<Output = ExecutionResult>
+from_closure<Func>(func: Func, reply: Option<ByteVector>) : DiagResult<StartRoutine> where Func: FnOnce() -> DiagResult<Option<ByteVector>>
+from_future<Fut>(future: Fut, reply: Option<ByteVector>) : DiagResult<StartRoutine> where Fut: Future<Output = DiagResult<Option<ByteVector>>>
